TEAM_MODE=multi
TEAM_SHAPE=architecture
TEAM_INTENSITY=strict

Review this project as it stands today and assess whether the current structure is a good foundation for the next phase.

Use the team hierarchy.
Have Product Strategist assess product direction, scope, and future-fit.
Have Architect assess structure, module boundaries, dependency flow, and maintainability.
Have Frontend and Backend assess implementation fit and likely pain points.
Have QA and SDET assess quality risk, validation gaps, regression exposure, and testability.
Have TPM recommend sequencing, milestones, and phased execution.
Then have Team Lead provide the final recommendation.
